title: The Year Long Road
writer: Giuseppe De Santis, Maurizio Ferrara, Tonino Guerra
actors: Silvana Pampanini, Eleonora Rossi Drago, Massimo Girotti
plot: The plot is set in an underdeveloped and remote area of a fictitious country, where the locals try to build an asphalt road in spite of careless attitude of the Government. The story follows the adventures in their self-reliant mi...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
